mdSummary:
# BorderBeam

Animated gradient border beam effect for hero elements.

**Package:** `Lumeo.Motion` · **Category:** Motion
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/border-beam

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| BorderBeam | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | Content wrapped inside the beamed border, rendered as the element the animated border traces around. |
| BorderBeam | Size | `BeamSize` | `BeamSize.Md` | Thickness of the animated border beam. Defaults to Md (1.5px). |
| BorderBeam | DurationMs | `int` | `8000` | How long, in milliseconds, one full loop of the beam animation takes. Defaults to 8000 (8s). |
| BorderBeam | ColorFrom | `string?` | `` | Starting color of the beam. Accepts any CSS color — defaults to var(--color-primary). |
| BorderBeam | ColorTo | `string?` | `` | Ending color of the beam. Accepts any CSS color — defaults to var(--color-primary). |
| BorderBeam | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the root div. |
| BorderBeam | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Unmatched attributes splatted onto the root div. |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (BorderBeam) — Content wrapped inside the beamed border, rendered as the element the animated border traces around.

## Events
- (none)

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- (none)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<BorderBeam />
```

## CSS variables
`--radius`

## Files
- `UI/BorderBeam/BorderBeam.razor`
